<!-- indicator: fig-dentists -->

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| warning: false
#| message: false
#| label: fig-dentists
#| fig-cap: 'Ratio of Residents to Dentists, 2019–2022'
#| fig-alt: 'Data visualization showing Ratio of Residents to Dentists, 2019–2022.'
from scripts.cha_registry_renderer import render_figure_object
render_figure_object(figure_id="fig-dentists", workbook_path=CHA_WORKBOOK_PATH).show()
```
